mapper.select: select count(1) from course where id = #{courseId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.sql: select d.id, d.tenant_id, d.course_id, d.module_id, d.title, d.document_type, d.latest_version_id, d.status, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.remark, m.module_name, v.version_no, v.original_filename, v.file_ext, v.file_size, v.status as version_status from course_document d left join course_module m on m.id = d.module_id and m.del_flag = '0' left join course_document_version v on v.id = d.latest_version_id and v.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select d.* from course_document d where d.id = #{id} and d.del_flag = '0' for update
mapper.update:
update course_document
module_id = #{moduleId}, title = #{title}, document_type = #{documentType}, latest_version_id = #{latestVersionId}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
update course_document set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
